dj_text: Hundetimen was the exhale. 23 kroner / Solfar is the space between breaths. Exist with it.
commercial_text: Welcome to Corporate Radio MAX from Kosmos Sigma-9.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: Frequency stabilized. For now. The walls between kosmos are thin today.
title: 23 kroner / Solfar
